channel.title: TGaceAllStories
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from TGaceAllStories, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Nine out of 10 bets this fund manager made over the past year have outperformed. These are his next two plays.
item.description: Gold miners, Japan stocks and nuclear plays boosted Man Group’s portfolio

item.title: My grandpa retired happily at 70 with $750K after working as a missionary. I know where most Americans go wrong.
item.description: “You could even retire at 55 with $500,000 and be perfectly fine. Am I right?”

item.title: Howard Marks of Oaktree makes 180-degree turn on AI after Claude tutorial. Here’s how he suggests investors approach it.
item.description: Legendary investor is still undecided about the AI bubble but the technology is revolutionary, he thinks. He believes AI has the capacity to be a bett...

item.title: After 46 years working, I’m not retiring — instead, I take a vacation every month. Is that a good life in your 70s?
item.description: “I’ve owned my own company for the last 15 years. It’s worth $8.5 million.”

item.title: Beware of banks breaking bad, warns top B. of A. strategist. He casts a wary eye on bank-loan ETFs.
item.description: Problem loans in the financial-services sector imply mounting risks for markets.

item.title: UBS turns bullish on Palantir, says buy the dip on this clear AI winner
item.description: UBS sees shares of Palantir rallying 23% from here.

item.title: Friday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
item.description: The S&P 500 and the Nasdaq Composite ended Thursday's trading with losses after shares of Nvidia slid more than 5%.

item.title: Netflix dropping its bid for Warner Bros. will spur big gains for the streaming giant, analysts say
item.description: Bottom line, analysts remained resoundingly bullish Netflix's long-term prospects.

item.title: These steady income-paying stocks could be on their way to becoming dividend aristocrats, Wolfe says
item.description: In a time of market upheaval, investors appreciate a stock paying a consistent dividend. The research firm has identified several with solid track rec...

item.title: Women’s wealth is expected to boom: Where they are investing and how they can maximize returns
item.description: Cerulli Associates anticipates $105 trillion in wealth will be passed down to heirs through 2048, with about $54 trillion of that inheritance going to...

item.title: Gilead Snaps Up Arcellx in $7.8B Cancer Drug Deal
item.description: Gilead's $7.8B acquisition of Arcellx boosts shares 78% amid push for new myeloma drug. Explore the deal, market impacts, and trading insights.

item.title: Valaris Stock Soars on $5.8B Transocean Acquisition
item.description: Valaris (VAL) shares close up 34.31% on news of a $5.8 billion all-stock acquisition by Transocean (RIG), creating a major offshore drilling powerhous...

item.title: Silicon Labs Soars on Texas Instruments Buyout Deal
item.description: Listen up, folks! If you’re scanning the markets today, you’ve got to see what’s happening with Silicon Labs (SLAB). As of this writing, shares have e...

item.title: Biotech Stocks Skyrocket on Game-Changing News
item.description: Discover why biotech stocks like CRVS and RAPT are surging today on trial breakthroughs and deals. Learn trading insights and risks in this exciting m...

item.title: SelectQuote Surges 23% on $415M Credit Facility News
item.description: SelectQuote (SLQT) stock jumped 23% on January 12, 2026 after securing a $415M credit facility. Dive into the details, risks, benefits, and how simila...
